data.title: Continuous Threat Monitoring
data.description: Advanced threat detection systems monitor for unusual patterns and potential threats.
data.technical_spec: Uses machine learning algorithms to analyze traffic patterns.

data.title: Data Encryption and Security
data.description: All data in transit and at rest is encrypted using industry-standard protocols.
data.technical_spec: Employs TLS for data in transit and AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Access Control Management
data.description: Strict access controls are implemented to ensure only authorized users access sensitive data.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes role-based access control (RBAC) and two-factor authentication.

data.title: Incident Response and Recovery
data.description: A dedicated team is available to swiftly respond to and recover from any security incident.
data.technical_spec: Has a defined incident response plan and employs automated tools to isolate affected systems.

data.title: Vulnerability Assessment Program
data.description: Regular assessments are conducted to identify and mitigate vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Employs automated scanning tools and manual code reviews.
